parents.subject: LU-11483 ldlm ofd_lvbo_init() and mdt_lvbo_fill() create env

commit.subject: LU-11515 lnet: monitor thread wakeup algorithm
commit.message:
LU-11515 lnet: monitor thread wakeup algorithm

Wake up the monitor thread only if there is work to be done.
Otherwise, wait until we're signaled to wakeup.

Signed-off-by: Amir Shehata <ashehata@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I54e1a1d3d360eddd4ef5cfcd8a34c86e1eab68ab
